channel.title: 📰 AI新闻 on AI热榜 - 每天 08:30 更新 | AI工具大全·AI导航·AI工具推荐

item.title: AI 动态：A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
item.description:
中文速读

中文速读：这条来自 OpenAI News 的 AI 动态关注「A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI」。建议结合英文原文查看具体细节。

English Original

Title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI

OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.

Title: Apple plays catch-up at WWDC

Apple spent much of its WWDC keynote highlighting fixes, performance improvements, and long-requested features before unveiling its upgraded AI-powered Siri, signaling that the company wants users to see AI as just one part of a broader effort to improve its…

English Original

Title: Five things you need to know about AI

At SXSW London last week I gave a talk called “Five things you need to know about AI,” in which I shared what I think are the biggest themes in AI right now. I pulled a few things from our first AI10 list, an annual guide to the most important trends in this…

item.description:

English Original

Title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026

A collage of I/O-related images, including the Antigravity Coffee Co. pop-up, a colorful jellyfish and a still from the Timmy TPU video. The word AI repeats three times on the left of the image, and there are colorful icons, including a sparkle, as well.

item.title: AI 动态：I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works
item.description:
中文速读

中文速读：这条来自 The Verge AI 的 AI 动态关注「I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works」。建议结合英文原文查看具体细节。

English Original

Title: I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works

Parents want one thing, and one thing only, out of AI: to add a list of soccer games or “spirit week” theme days from an email or a poorly formatted flyer onto their calendar in one shot. And I have good news for parents with iPhones - the new Siri can finall…

Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.

item.description:
中文速读

English Original

Title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 can make weirdly fun video games with the click of a button

Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is going to be a big hit with the web’s vibe coders.

item.title: Anthropic的Claude Fable 5是今天公众可以访问的Mythos的版本
item.description:
中文速读

Anthropic正在发布Claude Fable 5 ，这是其首款向公众开放的Mythos级模型。该模型配备了防护栏，可阻止网络安全和生物学等高风险领域的响应。

item.title: Codex为Notion解锁了什么
item.description:
中文速读

Notion如何使用Codex进行一次性规范，为网络构建AI语音输入，并在小型团队中倍增工程能力。

English Original

Title: What Codex unlocks for Notion

How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.

item.title: Justin Ernest如何在没有传统风险投资基金的情况下向热门创业公司投资近5亿$
item.description:
中文速读

这位Sabertooth风险投资创始人没有花一年时间筹集正式的风险基金，而是利用有限合伙人的专属网络投资于Anthropic、Anduril和SpaceX等初创公司。

item.title: Nextdoor的工程师如何使用Codex无限制地构建
item.description:

English Original

Title: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits

item.description:
中文速读

Sandstone的A轮比红杉主导的种子轮仅晚了六个月。

English Original

Title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams

Sandstone’s Series A comes just six months after a Sequoia-led seed round.

Title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more

item.title: 嘿， Siri ，这是我真正想要的人工智能
item.description:
中文速读

我迫切需要一个人工智能助理，但我真的想成为那种没有手机中友好的机器人声音就无法工作的人吗？

English Original

Title: Hey, Siri, here’s what I actually want from AI

I’m desperate for a personal AI assistant, but do I really want to become the kind of person who can’t function without the friendly robot voice in my phone?

item.title: 仅4B大小可端侧部署！卡帕西预言的「认知模型」被国产做出来了
item.description:
中文速读

效果比肩GPT-5.4

🔗 原始来源

如果你要核对细节，可以再看原文： 量子位原文链接

item.title: 科技公司能学会喜欢更便宜的人工智能模型吗？
item.description:
中文速读

如果这些相同的人工智能工作负载可以通过更便宜的模型来处理，而不会影响质量，那将意味着人工智能经济的巨大转变。

English Original

Title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?

item.title: 它不再是FAANG了。这是芒果。
item.description:
中文速读

随着SpaceX、Anthropic和OpenAI都瞄准了大规模的公开亮相，科技行业可能很快就会出现一类新的企业霸主–以及一个新的首字母缩略词。告别FAANG ，向芒果问好。

item.title: 推出North Mini Code ： Cohere首款面向开发人员的模型
item.description:
中文速读

中文速读：这条来自 Hugging Face Blog 的 AI 动态关注「Introducing North Mini Code: Cohere’s First Model For Developers」。建议结合英文原文查看具体细节。

item.title: 向美国证券交易委员会保密提交S-1草案
item.description:
中文速读

OpenAI确认向SEC提交了一份保密的S-1文件，但尚未确定采取进一步行动的时间。

English Original

Title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC

OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.

item.title: 语音代理可以处理双语客户吗？代码交换语音对标前沿ASR
item.description:
中文速读

中文速读：这条来自 Hugging Face Blog 的 AI 动态关注「Can Voice Agents Handle Bilingual Customers? Benchmarking Frontier ASR on Code-Switched Speech」。建议结合英文原文查看具体细节。

English Original

Title: Can Voice Agents Handle Bilingual Customers? Benchmarking Frontier ASR on Code-Switched Speech

item.title: 智能时代的产业政策
item.description:
中文速读

探索我们在人工智能时代雄心勃勃、以人为本的产业政策理念–随着先进智能的发展，专注于扩大机会、分享繁荣和建立有弹性的机构。
